props.description: Custom validation function to validate the form state.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Disable all inputs inside the form.

props.name: name
props.description: Path of the form's state within it's parent form.

props.name: validateOnInputDelay
props.description: Delay in milliseconds before validating the form on input events.

props.name: transform
props.description: If true, applies schema transformations on submit.

props.name: nested
props.description: If true, this form will attach to its parent Form and validate at the same time.

props.name: loadingAuto
props.description: When `true`, all form elements will be disabled on `@submit` event.

props.description: If true, validation on input will be active immediately instead of waiting for a blur event.

props.description: Delay in milliseconds before validating the form on input events.

props.description: The orientation of the form field.
